title: (Bullish Signal) VRNS enters Uptrend as Momentum indicator ascends above 0 level on Apr 05, 2021
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This indicator may be signaling that VRNS's price has momentum to move higher, since its current price exceeds the price logged 14 days ago. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested 72 similar cases where VRNS's Momentum Indicator exceeded 0, and 61 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 85%. Current price $54.68 crossed the resistance line at $50.04 and is trading between $81.71 resistance and $50.04 resistance lines. Throughout the month of 03/03/21 - 04/05/21, the price experienced a -6% Downtrend, while the week of 03/26/21 - 04/05/21 shows a +0.22% Uptrend.

https://preview.redd.it/5nql7dvcflr61.png?width=1529&format=png&auto=webp&s=0561c61f4e32c41b25ec27518977d7b0ca1900b6

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The RSI Indicator points to a transition from a downward trend to an upward trend -- in cases where VRNS's RSI Indicator exited the oversold zone, Tickeron A.I. detected that in 14 of 17 resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Stochastic Indicator suggests the stock price trend may be in a reversal from a downward trend to an upward trend. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 32 of 39 cases where VRNS's Stochastic Oscillator exited the oversold zone resulted in an increase in price. Tickeron's analysis proposes that the odds of a continued upward trend are 82%.

The Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) for VRNS just turned positive on April 05, 2021. Looking at past instances where VRNS's MACD turned positive, the stock continued to rise, Tickeron A.I. detected that in 37 of 44 cases over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 84%.

Following a +4.17% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where VRNS advanced for three days, in 291 of 376 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 77%.

VRNS may jump back above the lower band and head toward the middle band. Traders may consider buying the stock or exploring call options.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/10427818-varonis-systems-vrns-53-48-enters-uptrend-as-momentum-indicator-ascends-above-0-level-on-apr-05-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=blog)
